input_text: Penguins do not fly. The toy of the child was broken. The teacher showed the students the map. Muggles can not disappear. John is a nice man. A red and blue flag waved. Tom wanted to leave. John has an apple. A kitchen door was open. Agatha is in trouble. Mike is a nice man. Mice are afraid of cats. Anna handed a key to Mark. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Greg is a bad man. The guide offered the tourists tea. Mike has a pear. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Mary visited London in September. The stone was heavy. Which man has an apple?
